nl_query: Show the daily scanning velocity for each exam in December 2025: the number of scripts scanned per day, the change from the previous day, and the number of new bundles opened.
failed_sql: SELECT esc.exam_erp_id, esc.course_id, esc.exam_date, COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) AS scripts_scanned, (COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id) - LAG(COUNT(DISTINCT sh.script_id)) OVER (PARTITION BY esc.exam_erp_id, esc.course_id ORDER BY esc.exam_date)) AS change_from_previous_day, COUNT(CASE WHEN sh.status = 'OPEN' THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) AS new_bundles_opened FROM exam_schedule_cache esc JOIN bundle b ON b.exam_id = esc.id JOIN scan_history sh ON sh.bundle_id = b.id WHERE esc.exam_date >= '2025-12-01' AND esc.exam_date < '2026-01-01' GROUP BY esc.exam_erp_id, esc.course_id, esc.exam_date ORDER BY esc.exam_date;
error: Validation failed (schema): Invalid value: answer_script.scan_status = 'OPEN' is not a valid value for this column. Allowed values: NOT_SCANNED, RESCAN_NEEDED, SCANNED, SCAN_FAILED. Tip — this column is constrained to a fixed set of values by a CHECK constraint; only the listed values can ever exist in the data.
